title: Intense Mustardy Spanish Wonton Tortilla Espanola
description: A creamy and mustardy twist on the traditional Spanish dish, featuring wonton skin and quick-fix ingredients, grilled to perfection in a robata grill.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the mustard, sour cream, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Lay a wonton skin on a flat surface and brush the edges with olive oil.
Place about 1 tablespoon of the mustard mixture in the center of the wonton skin.
Sprinkle a pinch of shredded cheese over the mustard mixture.
Fold the wonton skin into a triangle or a square shape, pressing the edges to seal.
Repeat with the remaining wonton skins and filling ingredients.
Grill the wonton packets in the robata grill for about 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the Intense Mustardy Spanish Wonton Tortilla Espanola hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
